title: OncoPanther-AI: An Offline, Privacy-Preserving Nextflow Pipeline for Integrated Germline Variant Classification, Pharmacogenomics, and AI-Generated Clinical Genomic Narratives
description: OncoPanther-AI is a containerized, end-to-end Nextflow DSL2 pipeline for clinical whole-genome sequencing interpretation. It performs chromosome-scatter GATK variant calling (2.9x speedup), ACMG/AMP 2015 variant classification, PharmCAT pharmacogenomics (24 CPIC tier 1/2 genes), and AI-assisted clinical narrative generation using a locally-deployed LLaMA 3.2 3B model with ChromaDB RAG — without transmitting patient data to external servers. Validated against GIAB HG001 NISTv3.3.2 (SNP precision 0.9515, INDEL precision 0.8856).
references: Van der Auwera GA, O'Connor BD. Genomics in the Cloud. O'Reilly Media; 2020.
Sangkuhl K et al. PharmCAT. Clin Pharmacol Ther. 2020;107(1):203-210.
Richards S et al. Standards and guidelines for the interpretation of sequence variants. Genet Med. 2015;17(5):405-424.
Di Tommaso P et al. Nextflow enables reproducible computational workflows. Nat Biotechnol. 2017;35(4):316-319.
Krusche P et al. Best practices for benchmarking germline small-variant calls in human genomes. Nat Biotechnol. 2019;37:555-560.
